FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about NowBuild. Can't find an answer? Contact our team.

items.question: What is NowBuild?
items.answer: NowBuild is a production-ready SaaS framework built with Next.js, featuring integrated authentication (Clerk), payments (Stripe), database (Supabase), and full SEO optimization. It's designed to help you launch your product in days instead of months.

items.question: Do I need to know Next.js to use NowBuild?
items.answer: Basic knowledge of React and Next.js is recommended. NowBuild follows Next.js best practices and conventions, so familiarity with the App Router will help you customize the framework to your needs.

items.question: Can I use my own payment provider instead of Stripe?
items.answer: NowBuild is built with Stripe as the default payment provider, but the payment layer is modular. You can replace it with any payment provider by implementing the same interface in the payment service module.

items.question: Is NowBuild suitable for production use?
items.answer: Yes. NowBuild is built with production best practices including type safety, security headers, SEO optimization, error handling, and performance monitoring. It's designed to scale with your business from MVP to enterprise.

items.question: How does the multi-language support work?
items.answer: NowBuild uses next-intl for internationalization. All content is stored in JSON translation files, and the routing system automatically handles locale detection, URL prefixing, and hreflang tags for SEO.

items.question: Can I deploy to platforms other than Vercel?
items.answer: While NowBuild is optimized for Vercel, it's a standard Next.js application. You can deploy it to any platform that supports Next.js, including AWS, Netlify, Docker containers, or self-hosted servers.

posts.title: Getting Started with NowBuild: A Complete Guide
posts.excerpt: Learn how to set up your SaaS project from scratch using NowBuild. This guide covers authentication, payments, and deployment.
posts.author: NowBuild Team
posts.content:
NowBuild is designed to help developers launch SaaS products quickly without sacrificing quality or scalability. In this guide, we'll walk through the complete setup process.

## Prerequisites

Before getting started, make sure you have Node.js 18+ installed and accounts set up for Clerk, Stripe, and Supabase.

## Step 1: Clone and Install

Clone the NowBuild repository and install dependencies using npm or yarn.

## Step 2: Configure Environment

Copy the .env.example file and fill in your API keys for Clerk, Stripe, and Supabase.

## Step 3: Customize Your Brand

Update the theme colors, logo, and content in the translation files to match your brand.

## Step 4: Deploy to Vercel

Connect your repository to Vercel and deploy with a single click. NowBuild is optimized for the Vercel platform.

## What's Next?

Explore the documentation to learn about advanced features like webhooks, custom database schemas, and analytics integration.

posts.title: Why SEO Matters for SaaS Products in 2026
posts.excerpt: Discover why investing in SEO from day one can be the most impactful growth lever for your SaaS business.
posts.author: NowBuild Team
posts.content:
Many SaaS founders overlook SEO in the early stages, focusing instead on paid acquisition. But organic search traffic is one of the most sustainable and cost-effective growth channels available.

## The Compound Effect

Unlike paid ads, SEO traffic compounds over time. A well-optimized page can drive traffic for years.

## Technical SEO Foundation

Start with fast page loads, proper meta tags, structured data, and mobile optimization. These are table stakes.

## Content Strategy

Create content that answers your target audience's questions. Build topical authority in your niche.

## Measuring Success

Track organic traffic, keyword rankings, and conversion rates from organic visitors.

posts.title: Building a Multi-Language SaaS Application
posts.excerpt: A practical guide to implementing internationalization in your SaaS product using next-intl and best practices.
posts.author: NowBuild Team
posts.content:
Going global is one of the fastest ways to grow your SaaS user base. But implementing internationalization (i18n) correctly requires careful planning.

## Why i18n Matters

Over 60% of internet users prefer content in their native language. Supporting multiple languages dramatically increases your addressable market.

## Choosing an i18n Strategy

NowBuild uses next-intl with locale-based routing. Each language gets its own URL prefix for SEO benefits.

## Translation Workflow

Store translations in JSON files, use ICU message syntax for dynamic content, and consider using translation management platforms for larger teams.

## SEO Considerations

Implement hreflang tags, use locale-specific sitemaps, and ensure each language version has unique meta descriptions.

About.title: About NowBuild
About.subtitle: We're on a mission to make SaaS development accessible to every developer.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: NowBuild was born from a simple frustration: building the same boilerplate code for every new SaaS project. Authentication, payments, database setup, SEO optimization — the list goes on. We built NowBuild so developers can focus on what makes their product unique, not the infrastructure underneath.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To empower developers worldwide with the tools and framework they need to turn ideas into production-ready SaaS products — in days, not months.

items.title: Developer First
items.description: Every decision we make starts with the developer experience. Clean APIs, great docs, and sensible defaults.

items.title: Ship Fast
items.description: Speed matters. We optimize for rapid development without sacrificing code quality or security.

items.title: Open & Transparent
items.description: Our code is open. Our pricing is clear. Our roadmap is public. No surprises.

items.title: Quality Matters
items.description: We sweat the details — from type safety to pixel-perfect UI to comprehensive test coverage.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content:
Welcome to NowBuild ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website and use our services.

By accessing or using our Service, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree with our policies, please do not access or use our Service.

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.content:
We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

• **Account Information**: When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, and password.
• **Payment Information**: When you make a purchase, we collect payment card details. This information is processed directly by our payment processor (Stripe) and we do not store your full card details.
• **Usage Data**: We automatically collect information about how you interact with our Service, including pages visited, features used, and time spent.
• **Device Information**: We collect information about the device you use to access our Service, including IP address, browser type, and operating system.
• **Cookies and Tracking**: We use cookies and similar technologies to track activity on our Service and hold certain information.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
sections.content:
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve our Service
• Process transactions and send related information
• Send you technical notices, updates, and support messages
• Respond to your comments, questions, and customer service requests
• Monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities
• Detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent transactions and other illegal activities
• Personalize and improve your experience
• Send promotional communications (with your consent)

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
sections.content:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following situations:

• **Service Providers**: We share information with third-party service providers who perform services on our behalf, including payment processing (Stripe), authentication (Clerk), and data storage (Supabase).
• **Legal Requirements**: We may disclose your information if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities.
• **Business Transfers**: In connection with any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business.
• **With Your Consent**: We may share your information with your consent or at your direction.

sections.title: 5. Data Security
sections.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption in transit (TLS/SSL), encryption at rest, access controls, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure.

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. When we no longer need your information, we will securely delete or anonymize it.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.content:
Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information:

• **Access**: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you.
• **Correction**: Request that we correct inaccurate or incomplete information.
• **Deletion**: Request that we delete your personal information.
• **Portability**: Request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
• **Objection**: Object to the processing of your personal information.
• **Restriction**: Request that we restrict the processing of your information.

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@nowbuild.com.

sections.title: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our Service is not intended for children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child under 16, we will take steps to delete that information.

sections.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes.

sections.title: 10. Contact Us
sections.content:
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

• Email: privacy@nowbuild.com
• Address: [Your Company Address]

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content:
By accessing or using NowBuild (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use the Service.

These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service. By using the Service, you represent that you are at least 18 years of age and have the legal authority to enter into these Terms.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.content:
NowBuild is a software-as-a-service platform that provides tools and infrastructure for building, deploying, and managing web applications. The Service includes, but is not limited to, application hosting, authentication services, payment processing integration, database management, and related features.

We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time, with or without notice.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content:
To use certain features of the Service, you must create an account. You agree to:

• Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration
• Maintain the security of your password and account
• Promptly update your account information if it changes
• Accept responsibility for all activities that occur under your account
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account if any information provided is inaccurate, misleading, or incomplete.

sections.title: 4. Payment Terms
sections.content:
Certain features of the Service require payment of fees. By subscribing to a paid plan, you agree to:

• Pay all fees associated with your selected plan
• Provide valid payment information
• Authorize us to charge your payment method on a recurring basis

**Billing Cycles**: Subscriptions are billed either monthly or annually, depending on your selected plan.

**Cancellation**: You may cancel your subscription at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. No refunds are provided for partial billing periods.

**Price Changes**: We reserve the right to change our prices. Any price changes will be communicated at least 30 days in advance.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content:
You agree not to use the Service to:

• Violate any applicable laws or regulations
• Infringe on the intellectual property rights of others
• Distribute malware, spam, or harmful content
• Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service or other users' accounts
• Interfere with or disrupt the Service or its infrastructure
• Use the Service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose
• Engage in any activity that could harm the Service or its users

sections.title: 6. Intellectual Property
sections.content:
The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by NowBuild and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

Your content remains yours. By uploading content to the Service, you grant us a non-exclusive, worldwide license to use, store, and display that content solely for the purpose of providing the Service.

You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our Service without explicit written permission.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content:
TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, NOWBUILD SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES.

Our total liability for any claims arising from or relating to the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim.

sections.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.content:
THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

We do not warrant that the Service will be uninterrupted, timely, secure, or error-free.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.content:
We may terminate or suspend your access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including breach of these Terms.

Upon termination, your right to use the Service will cease immediately. All provisions of these Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive, including ownership, warranty disclaimers, and limitations of liability.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
sections.content:
These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which NowBuild is incorporated, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

Any disputes arising from these Terms or the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of the applicable arbitration authority.

sections.title: 11. Changes to Terms
sections.content:
We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of significant changes by posting the updated Terms on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

Your continued use of the Service after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

sections.title: 12. Contact
sections.content:
If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at:

• Email: legal@nowbuild.com
• Address: [Your Company Address]
